zh.lifeSummary: 當William Cheselden於1350年出生在英國英格蘭戴文霍爾可姆 洛古斯時，他的父親John Chiseldon25歲，母親Elizabet de la Warr24歲。他與Elizabeth de Warre結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1427年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維林頓享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特維林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Cheselden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Hazeldine
meanings: English: locative name, chiefly from Heselden (in Halton Gill, Durham), though Haselden (Sussex), Haslingden (Lancs), and Hazledon Farm (Wilts, recorded as Heseldene in about 1130) are alternative possibilities. There has been some confusion with Hazelton.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Cheselden was born in 1350, in Holcombe Rogus, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Chiseldon, was 25 and his mother, Elizabet de la Warr, was 24. He married Elizabeth de Warre. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1427, in Wellington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Wellington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

ko.All Saints' Church, Holcombe Rogus, Mid: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 홀코브 로구스 앨 세인츠' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Cheselden(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 홀코브 로구스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Chiseldon(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabet de la Warr(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Elizabeth de Warre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웰잉턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 웰잉턴에 묻혔다.

Он умер в 1427 г. в местности веллингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности веллингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
